title: IRGC vows 'heavy assault on American centers' if more tankers attacked — missiles 'locked onto enemy, awaiting order'
snippet: IRGC Naval Command says any aggression targeting Iran's oil tankers will result in heavy assault against American centers in the region. IRGC Aerospace Force says missiles and drones are locked onto the enemy, awaiting order to fire. This is a significant escalation of rhetoric — Day 71 of ceasefire.
tag_reason: No previous source covered IRGC's twin threat (Navy + Aerospace) rhetoric of this specificity
